_comment: James ML output — SHIP-7781, Hamburg case (Lena 2.0 seed, updated 2026-06-11 to 14-day delay scenario). Immutable from receipt. See docs/architecture/06-data-contracts.md §1
_change_note: Updated 2026-06-11: delay scenario upgraded from 5-day to 14-day to reflect realistic SME disruption magnitude. ETA dates updated accordingly. expected_delay_days is the reference value for DecisionRecord.context_snapshot.predicted_delay_days and for computeActualDelay() in DK-602.
